title: eurycoma harmandiana var. thorelii
intro: Eurycoma harmandiana var. thorelii, also known as Longjack or Tongkat Ali, is a plant species belonging to the Simaroubaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Eurycoma harmandiana var. thorelii include improved physical performance, enhanced endurance, and increased testosterone levels, making it a popular herbal supplement among athletes and bodybuilders. Eurycoma harmandiana var. thorelii can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used to support overall health and well-being.
